text:
On 2007-05-20 01:40 +0000, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

# Maintainer of security/base,

# and a committer will take care of it.
# 
# The full text of the PR can be found at:
#     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/112795

Approved.
